_meta.description: Deterministic XLSX operator catalog with strict schemas and runtime mapping.

rangeA1.description: Target range in A1 notation, e.g. B2:B100

sourceRow.description: 1-based row number of the source cell to copy from

formula.description: Formula to fill down with relative references adjusted

examples_en: Fill down the formula from B2 to B2:B100
Copy the value from A1 down to A1:A20
examples_pt: Preencher para baixo a fórmula de B2 até B2:B100
Copiar o valor de A1 para baixo até A1:A20

rangeA1.description: Target range in A1 notation, e.g. A1:E1

sourceCol.description: 1-based column number of the source cell to copy from

formula.description: Formula to fill right with relative references adjusted

examples_en: Fill right from A1 to A1:E1
Copy formula from A2 across to E2
examples_pt: Preencher para direita de A1 até E1
Copiar fórmula de A2 até E2

rangeA1.description: Target range in A1 notation, e.g. A1:A20

type.description: Series type: linear for numeric sequences, date for date sequences

examples_en: Fill A1:A20 with numbers 1 to 20
Create a date series from Jan 1 to Jan 31
examples_pt: Preencher A1:A20 com números de 1 a 20
Criar série de datas de 1 a 31 de janeiro

rangeA1.description: Range to apply color scale to, in A1 notation

minColor.description: Hex color for the minimum value, e.g. #FF0000

maxColor.description: Hex color for the maximum value, e.g. #00B050

midColor.description: Hex color for the midpoint value (optional 3-color scale)

examples_en: Apply color scale from red to green on B2:B20
Add heat map colors to the margin column
examples_pt: Aplicar escala de cores de vermelho a verde em B2:B20

rangeA1.description: Range to apply top-N highlighting to, in A1 notation

n.description: Number of top values to highlight (default 10)

percent.description: If true, treat n as a percentage instead of absolute count

backgroundHex.description: Background color hex for highlighted cells, e.g. #FFA500

examples_en: Highlight top 10 values in B2:B50
Mark the top 5% in orange
examples_pt: Destacar os 10 maiores valores em B2:B50

rangeA1.description: A1 range of cells to normalize

textCase.description: Target text case (only for text_case normalization)
